markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nadiem Amiri records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Germany vs Ivory Coast professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 20, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Germany vs Ivory Coast professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 20, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Nadiem Amiri: 1+ goals

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 20, 2026 7 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 89.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 89.99° on Jun 20, 2026 at 7pm EDT?
